# 🌊 Pi Agent Configuration

### A highly customized [Pi Coding Agent](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) setup with multi-agent orchestration, custom themes, and a rich extension ecosystem

## 🔭 Overview

This is a power-user configuration for **Pi**, a terminal-based AI coding agent by [@mariozechner](https://github.com/badlogic). The setup transforms Pi from a single-agent assistant into a **multi-agent orchestration platform** with:

- **17 custom extensions** — from ASCII banners to full pipeline orchestrators
- **11 custom themes** — dark, colorful terminal themes (Catppuccin, Dracula, Nord, Synthwave, etc.)
- **6 operational modes** — NORMAL, PLAN, SPEC, PIPELINE, TEAM, CHAIN
- **Multi-provider model support** — Anthropic (default), GitHub Copilot, Google Gemini, OpenAI, and 16+ open-source models via Synthetic
- **Commander integration** — real-time task dashboard via MCP bridge

---

## 🏗 Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     Pi Coding Agent (TUI)                    │
│  ┌─────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  │
│  │ Widgets  │  │  Footer  │  │  Banner  │  │ Mode Block  │  │
│  │ (above/  │  │ (model,  │  │ (ASCII   │  │ (colored    │  │
│  │  below   │  │  ctx %,  │  │  art on  │  │  bar w/     │  │
│  │  editor) │  │  cwd)    │  │  start)  │  │  mode name) │  │
│  └─────────┘  └──────────┘  └──────────┘  └─────────────┘  │
│                                                              │
│  ┌──────────────── Extension API ──────────────────────┐     │
│  │  Events: session_start, input, tool_call, agent_end │     │
│  │  Tools:  tasks, dispatch_agent, run_chain, set_mode │     │
│  │  UI:     widgets, status, notifications, overlays   │     │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘     │
│                                                              │
│  ┌─────────────── Agent Orchestration ─────────────────┐     │
│  │                                                      │     │
│  │  TEAM Mode        CHAIN Mode       PIPELINE Mode    │     │
│  │  ┌──────────┐    ┌──────────┐    ┌───────────────┐  │     │
│  │  │Dispatcher│    │Sequential│    │ UNDERSTAND →   │  │     │
│  │  │  ↓   ↓   │    │ Step 1   │    │ GATHER →      │  │     │
│  │  │ Agent Agent│   │  ↓       │    │ PLAN →        │  │     │
│  │  │  A    B   │    │ Step 2   │    │ EXECUTE →     │  │     │
│  │  │  ↓    ↓   │    │  ↓       │    │ REVIEW        │  │     │
│  │  │ [results] │    │ Step N   │    └───────────────┘  │     │
│  │  └──────────┘    └──────────┘                        │     │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘     │
│                                                              │
│  ┌────────── Theme Engine ──────────┐                        │
│  │  11 themes × 60+ color tokens   │                        │
│  │  JSON schema w/ vars + colors    │                        │
│  │  Live cycling: Ctrl+X / Ctrl+Q  │                        │
│  └──────────────────────────────────┘                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 📁 Directory Structure

```
~/.pi/
├── agent/
│   ├── settings.json          # Main configuration (provider, model, theme, packages)
│   ├── models.json            # Custom model provider definitions (Synthetic, etc.)
│   ├── keybindings.json       # Custom keybinding overrides
│   ├── auth.json              # OAuth tokens for providers (Anthropic, GitHub, Google, OpenAI)
│   ├── extensions/            # 17 TypeScript extensions (see below)
│   │   ├── lib/               # Shared utilities (19 modules)
│   │   ├── __tests__/         # Vitest test suite
│   │   └── *.ts               # Extension entry points
│   ├── themes/                # 11 custom JSON theme files
│   ├── sessions/              # Persisted conversation sessions
│   └── pi-crash.log           # Crash diagnostics
├── docs/
│   └── agent-workflow.html    # Interactive HTML doc: "How It Works & Why It's Slow"
├── agent-sessions/            # Cross-session agent state
└── .pi/
    └── agent-sessions/        # Subagent session files (per-project)
```

---

## 🧩 Extension System

Extensions are TypeScript files loaded via the `packages` array in `settings.json`. Each extension exports a default function that receives the `ExtensionAPI` and can:

- **Register tools** — custom tools the LLM can invoke
- **Register commands** — slash commands (`/theme`, `/tasks`, `/mode`, etc.)
- **Register shortcuts** — keyboard shortcuts (`Ctrl+G`, `Shift+Tab`, etc.)
- **Set widgets** — UI components above/below the editor
- **Listen to events** — `session_start`, `input`, `tool_call`, `agent_end`, `before_agent_start`
- **Inject system prompts** — modify the agent's instructions per mode

### Extension Anatomy

```typescript
import type { ExtensionAPI } from "@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent";

export default function (pi: ExtensionAPI) {
  // Listen to lifecycle events
  pi.on("session_start", async (_event, ctx) => {
    ctx.ui.setStatus("my-ext", "Hello!");
  });

  // Register a tool the LLM can call
  pi.registerTool({
    name: "my_tool",
    label: "My Tool",
    description: "Does something useful",
    parameters: Type.Object({ input: Type.String() }),
    async execute(_id, params, _signal, _onUpdate, ctx) {
      return { content: [{ type: "text", text: `Got: ${params.input}` }] };
    },
    renderCall(args, theme) { /* ... */ },
    renderResult(result, options, theme) { /* ... */ },
  });

  // Register a slash command
  pi.registerCommand("mycommand", {
    description: "Does a thing",
    handler: async (args, ctx) => { /* ... */ },
  });

  // Register a keyboard shortcut
  pi.registerShortcut("ctrl+m", {
    description: "Toggle something",
    handler: async (ctx) => { /* ... */ },
  });
}
```

### 📋 Extension Catalog

| Extension | File | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| **Agent Banner** | `agent-banner.ts` | ASCII art banner above editor on startup; auto-hides on first input |
| **Mode Cycler** | `mode-cycler.ts` | Cycles operational modes (NORMAL/PLAN/SPEC/PIPELINE/TEAM/CHAIN) via `Shift+Tab` |
| **Agent Chain** | `agent-chain.ts` | Sequential pipeline orchestrator — chains agent steps with prompt templates |
| **Agent Team** | `agent-team.ts` | Multi-agent dispatcher with specialist agents and grid dashboard |
| **Pipeline Team** | `pipeline-team.ts` | Hybrid sequential + parallel pipeline (UNDERSTAND → GATHER → PLAN → EXECUTE → REVIEW) |
| **Session Replay** | `session-replay.ts` | Scrollable session timeline replay via `/replay` command |
| **Subagent Widget** | `subagent-widget.ts` | Spawns background subagent processes with live status widgets (`/sub`, `/subcont`) |
| **System Select** | `system-select.ts` | Switch system prompts by selecting agent definitions via `/system` |
| **Theme Cycler** | `theme-cycler.ts` | Cycle themes with `Ctrl+X`/`Ctrl+Q`, color swatch preview, persists selection |
| **Tasks** | `tasks.ts` | Task discipline — gates agent tools until tasks are defined; 3-state lifecycle |
| **Commander MCP** | `commander-mcp.ts` | Bridge to Commander dashboard via MCP; exposes task/mailbox/orchestration tools |
| **Commander Tracker** | `commander-tracker.ts` | Tracks and retries failed Commander sync operations |
| **Toolkit Commands** | `toolkit-commands.ts` | Additional utility commands |
| **User Question** | `user-question.ts` | Rich interactive `ask_user` tool — select, input, and confirm dialogs with markdown preview |
| **Agent Nav** | `agent-nav.ts` | Shared F-key navigation (F1–F4) for agent widgets |
| **Footer** | `footer.ts` | Dark status bar: model name · context % · working directory |
| **Tool Counter** | `tool-counter-widget.ts` | Live per-tool call counter with colored pill badges |

### Shared Libraries (`extensions/lib/`)

| Module | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `themeMap.ts` | Extension-to-theme default mappings |
| `pipeline-render.ts` | Status button pills and timeline rendering |
| `mode-cycler-logic.ts` | Mode cycling state machine |
| `mode-prompts.ts` | System prompts for NORMAL/PLAN/SPEC modes |
| `parse-chain-yaml.ts` | YAML parser for chain definitions |
| `parse-pipeline-yaml.ts` | YAML parser for pipeline configurations |
| `commander-sync.ts` | Bidirectional sync between local tasks and Commander |
| `commander-ready.ts` | Gate/queue for Commander MCP readiness |
| `commander-tracker.ts` | Retry logic for failed Commander operations |
| `context-budget.ts` | Context window usage monitoring (warn/critical thresholds) |
| `task-list-render.ts` | Scrollable task list rendering with navigation |
| `tasks-confirm.ts` | Confirmation logic for destructive task operations |
| `ui-helpers.ts` | `padRight`, `wordWrap`, `sideBySide` utilities |
| `defaults.ts` | Default subagent model constant |
| `persist-theme.ts` | Write theme selection back to `settings.json` |
| `mcp-client.ts` | Lightweight MCP JSON-RPC client over stdio |
| `ask-user-details.ts` | Details builder for the `ask_user` tool |
| `session-replay-helpers.ts` | History item extraction for session replay |
| `subagent-cleanup.ts` | Cleanup old subagent session files |

---

## 🎨 Theme System

Themes are JSON files in `agent/themes/` following the Pi theme schema. Each theme defines:

1. **Variables (`vars`)** — Named color definitions (hex codes)
2. **Color tokens (`colors`)** — 60+ semantic tokens mapped to variables or raw values
3. **Export colors (`export`)** — Colors for external rendering (HTML export)

### Theme Structure

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../theme-schema.json",
  "name": "midnight-ocean",
  "vars": {
    "deepBlue": "#0a192f",
    "oceanBlue": "#0077be",
    "teal": "#00ced1",
    "successGreen": "#64ffda",
    "errorRed": "#ff5f56"
  },
  "colors": {
    "accent": "oceanBlue",
    "success": "successGreen",
    "error": "errorRed",
    "mdHeading": "teal",
    "syntaxKeyword": "purple",
    "toolDiffAdded": "successGreen"
  },
  "export": {
    "pageBg": "#0a192f",
    "cardBg": "#112240"
  }
}
```

### Available Themes

| Theme | Vibe |
|-------|------|
| 🌊 `midnight-ocean` | Deep navy + teal accents (default) |
| 🐱 `catppuccin-mocha` | Warm pastels on dark chocolate |
| 🧛 `dracula` | Purple + green on charcoal |
| 🌲 `everforest` | Muted greens on warm dark |
| 🟤 `gruvbox` | Retro warm earth tones |
| ❄️ `nord` | Arctic, minimalist blue palette |
| 🏖️ `ocean-breeze` | Light ocean blue tones |
| 🌹 `rose-pine` | Muted rose + pine on dark |
| 🌆 `synthwave` | Hot pink + cyan neon |
| 🌃 `tokyo-night` | Indigo + magenta city lights |
| 🏔️ `cyberpunk` | High-contrast neon on black |

### Switching Themes

```
Ctrl+X          → Cycle forward through themes
Ctrl+Q          → Cycle backward
/theme          → Open theme picker
/theme nord     → Switch directly by name
```

Theme selection persists to `settings.json` automatically.

---

## 🔀 Operational Modes

The **Mode Cycler** extension (`Shift+Tab`) rotates through six operational modes, each injecting a tailored system prompt:

| Mode | Color | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| **NORMAL** | — | Default: direct coding assistance + mode auto-detection |
| **PLAN** | 🔵 Blue | Planning only — outline approach without writing code |
| **SPEC** | 🔷 Cyan | Specification writing — detailed technical specs |
| **PIPELINE** | 🟢 Green | 5-phase hybrid pipeline (UNDERSTAND → REVIEW) |
| **TEAM** | 🟡 Yellow | Multi-agent dispatch — coordinator + specialist agents |
| **CHAIN** | 🔴 Red | Sequential chain execution from YAML definitions |

Modes can also be set programmatically via the `set_mode` tool or the `/mode` command.

---

## 🤖 Multi-Agent Orchestration

### Team Mode (`agent-team.ts`)

The primary agent becomes a **dispatcher** that delegates work to specialist agents:

```
User → Dispatcher (primary agent)
         ├── dispatch_agent("scout", "Explore the auth module")
         ├── dispatch_agent("builder", "Implement the login form")
         └── dispatch_agent("reviewer", "Audit the auth changes")
```

**Key features:**
- Agents are defined in `.pi/agents/*.md` with frontmatter (name, description, tools, model)
- Teams are defined in `.pi/agents/teams.yaml`
- Each agent maintains its own Pi session for cross-invocation memory
- Real-time status pills (idle → running → done/error) with `Ctrl+G` toggle
- F1–F4 navigation for agent selection and detail overlays
- Commander integration for task tracking and mailbox messaging

### Chain Mode (`agent-chain.ts`)

Sequential pipeline where each step's output feeds into the next:

```yaml
# .pi/agents/agent-chain.yaml
my-chain:
  steps:
    - agent: scout
      prompt: "Analyze: $INPUT"
    - agent: builder
      prompt: "Implement based on analysis: $INPUT (original: $ORIGINAL)"
```

### Pipeline Mode (`pipeline-team.ts`)

Hybrid sequential + parallel execution through 5 phases:

```
Phase 1: UNDERSTAND  (interactive — user conversation)
Phase 2: GATHER      (parallel scouts explore codebase)
Phase 3: PLAN        (sequential planner creates implementation plan)
Phase 4: EXECUTE     (parallel builders implement the plan)
Phase 5: REVIEW      (reviewer audits, primary decides approve/re-dispatch)
```

---

## ⚙️ Configuration Guide

### `agent/settings.json`

```jsonc
{
  "defaultProvider": "anthropic",        // Primary LLM provider
  "defaultModel": "claude-opus-4-6",     // Default model ID
  "defaultThinkingLevel": "off",         // Thinking: off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh
  "hideThinkingBlock": true,             // Collapse thinking in UI
  "theme": "midnight-ocean",             // Active theme name
  "transport": "sse",                    // API transport: sse|streaming
  "steeringMode": "one-at-a-time",      // Tool execution: one-at-a-time|parallel
  "quietStartup": true,                  // Suppress startup messages
  "showHardwareCursor": true,            // Use terminal hardware cursor
  "editorPaddingX": 2,                   // Horizontal editor padding
  "doubleEscapeAction": "tree",          // Double-Esc opens session tree
  "packages": [                          // Extensions to load (order matters)
    "extensions/agent-banner.ts",
    "extensions/mode-cycler.ts",
    "extensions/agent-team.ts",
    // ... 14 more
  ]
}
```

### `agent/models.json`

Defines custom model providers beyond the built-in ones:

```jsonc
{
  "providers": {
    "synthetic": {
      "baseUrl": "https://api.synthetic.new/openai/v1",
      "api": "openai-completions",
      "models": [
        {
          "id": "hf:Qwen/Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct",
          "name": "Qwen 3 Coder 480B",
          "reasoning": false,
          "contextWindow": 128000,
          "maxTokens": 16384
        }
        // ... 15 more models
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

**Available via Synthetic:** Qwen 3.5 397B, Qwen 3 Coder 480B, Kimi K2.5, DeepSeek V3.2, DeepSeek R1, GLM 4.7, MiniMax M2.5, GPT OSS 120B, Llama 3.3 70B, and more.

### `agent/keybindings.json`

```json
{
  "cycleThinkingLevel": ["ctrl+shift+t"]
}
```

---

## 🗂 Key Files Reference

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `agent/settings.json` | Master configuration — provider, model, theme, extensions |
| `agent/models.json` | Custom provider/model definitions |
| `agent/keybindings.json` | Keyboard shortcut overrides |
| `agent/auth.json` | OAuth tokens for Anthropic, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, OpenAI |
| `agent/themes/*.json` | Theme definitions (11 themes) |
| `agent/extensions/*.ts` | Extension entry points (17 extensions) |
| `agent/extensions/lib/*.ts` | Shared utility modules (19 libraries) |
| `agent/extensions/__tests__/` | Vitest test suite |
| `agent/extensions/package.json` | Extension dependencies (yaml, vitest) |
| `agent/sessions/` | Persisted conversation sessions |
| `agent/pi-crash.log` | Crash diagnostics |
| `docs/agent-workflow.html` | Interactive architecture documentation |
| `.pi/agent-sessions/` | Subagent session files |

---

## ⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action | Extension |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| `Shift+Tab` | Cycle operational mode | mode-cycler |
| `Ctrl+X` | Next theme | theme-cycler |
| `Ctrl+Q` | Previous theme | theme-cycler |
| `Ctrl+G` | Toggle compact/expanded agent view | agent-team |
| `Ctrl+Shift+T` | Cycle thinking level | built-in (keybindings.json) |
| `F1` | Select previous agent/task | agent-nav |
| `F2` | Select next agent/task | agent-nav |
| `F3` | Open agent detail overlay | agent-nav |
| `F4` | Exit selection | agent-nav |
| `Esc Esc` | Open session tree | built-in |

---

## 🧪 Testing

Extensions include a Vitest test suite:

```bash
cd agent/extensions
npm test              # Run tests
npm run test:watch    # Watch mode
npm run test:coverage # Coverage report
```

---

## 📄 Slash Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/mode` | Set or pick operational mode |
| `/theme` | Set or pick a theme |
| `/system` | Switch system prompt from agent definitions |
| `/tasks` | Interactive task overlay |
| `/agents-team` | Switch active agent team |
| `/agents-list` | List loaded agents |
| `/agents-grid N` | Set agent grid columns (1–6) |
| `/chain` | Switch active chain |
| `/chain-list` | List available chains |
| `/pipeline` | Select pipeline configuration |
| `/pipeline-status` | Full pipeline state |
| `/pipeline-reset` | Reset pipeline to phase 1 |
| `/pipeline-off` | Deactivate pipeline |
| `/replay` | Scrollable session timeline |
| `/sub <task>` | Spawn background subagent |
| `/subcont <id> <msg>` | Continue subagent conversation |
| `/subrm <id>` | Remove subagent widget |
| `/subclear` | Clear all subagent widgets |
